name: Grand Junction (High)

restrictions.text: Fire restrictions may be in place, for up to date info:

thresholds:
ERC > 90%, BI > 90%, Wind Speed > 15
Max Temp > 75, Min Rh < 20, 1000hr Fuels < 12, Max RH < 55
If three or more of the seven thresholds are met, consider it a watchout.
raws:
The High Elevation Fire Danger Rating Area uses the folHighing Remote Automated Weather Stations (RAWS) which are equally weighted in value, using Fuel Model Y (Timber) incorporating data years 2005-2024 are:  
51510: Deep Creek, 51606: Dowd Jct, 51703: Soda Creek
